64 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
Mars in 3rd house from Mercury. The native will be a dealer in vehicles. As
the native will be very proud and egoistic, he will live away from his relations
and friends. He will have no harmony in his family life on account of presence
of the Moon behind Venus. He will incur losses. If not married at 27, he will
marry at 34-35 and live upto 69-70 years. He will have trouble from Govern
ment and have marks of wounds on his body. 29, 30, 33, 43, 45th years are
troublesome for the native.
